title: stillingia laurocerasus
intro: Stillingia laurocerasus, also known as Queen's Delight, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and joint pain. The health benefits of Stillingia laurocerasus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Stillingia laurocerasus include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
